clues: A user created a network bridge between their Ethernet and Wi-Fi adapters and now has no internet.
Both network adapters show 'Network Bridge' in the Network Connections panel.
The bridge has an IP address from a different subnet than the corporate network.
Other devices on the same network segment lost network access around the same time.
The user admits they were trying to 'share internet' with a game console.
